codeReview.summary: Implementation successfully repairs `pnpm delivery-loop:local run --profile fast|full` by replacing stale test paths with existing test files, adds comprehensive CLI contract tests for VAL-CLI-001..006 and VAL-CLI-012, and fixes a missing import. All verification assertions pass deterministically.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission created extensive documentation in .factory/library/ (architecture.md, environment.md, user-testing.md) capturing delivery-loop patterns, port ranges, validation surfaces, and canonical state contracts. This knowledge should be retained and cross-referenced from AGENTS.md.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Commit a3dd2a8 added 190+ lines to .factory/library/ with system model, data flows, architectural invariants, and validation guidance not previously documented.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker created three skill files (.factory/skills/delivery-loop-*/SKILL.md) for this mission. The validation-worker skill was used and followed. These skills should be evaluated for retention post-mission.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skills delivery-loop-cleanup-worker, delivery-loop-runtime-worker, and delivery-loop-validation-worker were created with 85-77 lines each.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The .factory/services.yaml was properly updated with corrected test commands matching the fixed delivery-loop:local run profiles.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: services.yaml now lists: test: pnpm -C packages/shared exec vitest run src/delivery-loop/domain/failure-signature.test.ts src/delivery-loop/store/dispatch-intent-store.test.ts && ... (the fixed paths)

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation correctly followed TDD pattern: created failing tests first (in delivery-loop-local-framework.test.ts), then fixed the implementation. Contract tests are comprehensive and behavioral rather than implementation-focused.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Test file has 242 lines covering 7 VAL-CLI assertions with proper mock-based behavioral testing.

summary: Feature m1-repair-local-validation-runner passes review. The implementation correctly fixes stale test paths, adds comprehensive CLI contract tests covering all 7 validation assertions (VAL-CLI-001..006, VAL-CLI-012), and includes all required verification evidence. No blocking or non-blocking code issues found. The shared state created (.factory/library/, skills/) should be retained for future missions.
